Terms & Conditions

UBA DIGITAL KYC
ACCOUNT UPGRADE CONSENT FORM
Tier 1 to Tier 3 — Digital Self-Service
To upgrade your account, we need to verify your identity and address. Please review and accept the terms below to begin.
WHEREAS:
1. At my request, United Bank for Africa Plc (UBA) has agreed to process my application to upgrade my account from Tier 1 to Tier 3 through a digital self-service channel, without requiring a physical branch visit.
2. UBA has informed me that this upgrade process requires the digital verification of my identity and residential address in accordance with the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) AML/CFT Regulations and the CBN Customer Due Diligence Regulations 2023.
3. I understand that upon successful upgrade to Tier 3, my daily transaction limit will be increased to ₦1,000,000 (One Million Naira) and all balance caps applicable to Tier 1 accounts will be removed, subject to CBN-approved limits.
NOW, in consideration of UBA processing this upgrade, I hereby confirm and declare that:
1. Identity Verification Consent: I authorise UBA to verify my identity by querying my Bank Verification Number (BVN) against the Nigeria Inter-Bank Settlement System (NIBSS) database, and to cross-check my submitted identity documents against the relevant issuing authority portals, including NIS, INEC, and the National Identity Management Commission (NIMC).
2. Biometric Data Consent: I consent to the capture and processing of my biometric data, including a live facial image and liveness verification, for the purpose of confirming that I am the genuine holder of the identity documents and BVN submitted. I understand that this data will be processed solely for KYC compliance and will not be shared with third parties outside of the regulatory verification process.
3. Document Authenticity Declaration: I declare that all identity documents and proof of address documents submitted during this process are genuine, valid, and accurately represent my current legal identity and residential address. I acknowledge that submission of false, altered, or borrowed documents constitutes a criminal offence under the Money Laundering (Prevention and Prohibition) Act 2022 and may result in immediate account restriction and referral to law enforcement.
4. Address Verification Consent: I consent to UBA verifying my residential address digitally through Optical Character Recognition (OCR) cross-matching of my declared address against my submitted utility bill or bank statement. I understand that if my address cannot be verified digitally, UBA's Address Verification Team may contact me and, if necessary, dispatch a field officer to confirm my residency within 24–48 hours. I agree to cooperate with this process.
5. Data Processing: I consent to UBA processing and retaining my personal data, including name, date of birth, address, BVN details, identity document data, and biometric data, for the purposes of regulatory compliance, KYC record-keeping, and ongoing customer due diligence, in accordance with the Nigeria Data Protection Act 2023.
6. Risk Scoring: I understand that my application will be subject to an automated risk assessment by UBA's AI-powered risk scoring engine. I acknowledge that if I am assessed as high-risk, my account upgrade may require Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) by a UBA Account Officer before activation, and that this does not constitute a refusal of service.
7. Security Responsibility: I confirm that I will not share my PIN, password, or OTP with any person including UBA staff at any time. I acknowledge that UBA will never request these credentials and accept full responsibility for any transactions authorised using my credentials.
8. I agree that UBA may, at any time, reverse or restrict my upgraded account status if it is determined that the information provided during this process was false, incomplete, or fraudulently obtained, without prejudice to any legal action UBA may take.
←

Terms & Conditions

UBA DIGITAL KYC
ACCOUNT REACTIVATION CONSENT FORM
Dormant / Restricted Account — Digital Re-Verification
To reactivate your account, we need to re-verify your identity and address. Please review and accept the terms below to begin.
WHEREAS:
1. At my request, United Bank for Africa Plc (UBA) has agreed to process the reactivation of my dormant or restricted account through a digital self-service channel, without requiring a physical branch visit.
2. UBA has informed me that account reactivation requires fresh, full KYC re-verification in accordance with the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) Customer Due Diligence Regulations 2023, which mandates that a dormant account customer's identity and documents must be re-verified before access is restored, regardless of prior verification status.
3. I understand that upon successful re-verification, my account will be reactivated and its transaction tier and limits restored. Where fresh documentation indicates a change in risk profile, the tier at which my account is reactivated may be adjusted accordingly.
NOW, in consideration of UBA processing this reactivation, I hereby confirm and declare that:
1. Identity Re-Verification Consent: I authorise UBA to re-verify my identity by querying my Bank Verification Number (BVN) against the NIBSS database, and to cross-check my re-submitted identity documents against the relevant issuing authority portals, including NIS, INEC, and NIMC. I understand this is a mandatory requirement under CBN CDD Regulations 2023 and cannot be waived.
2. Biometric Data Consent: I consent to the capture and processing of my biometric data, including a live facial image and liveness verification, to confirm that I am the genuine and living holder of the identity documents submitted. I understand that this check is required regardless of whether biometric data was captured at the time of original account opening.
3. Document Freshness Requirement: I acknowledge that all documents submitted must be current and valid at the time of submission. Proof of address must have been issued within the last three months. Identity documents must not be expired. I declare that all submitted documents are genuine, unaltered, and accurately represent my current legal identity and residential address.
4. Address Verification Consent: I consent to UBA verifying my current residential address digitally through OCR cross-matching of my declared address against my submitted utility bill or bank statement. I understand that if my address cannot be verified digitally, UBA's Address Verification Team may dispatch a field officer to confirm my residency within 24–48 hours, and I agree to cooperate fully with this process.
5. Data Processing: I consent to UBA processing and retaining my personal data for regulatory compliance, KYC record-keeping, and ongoing customer due diligence in accordance with the Nigeria Data Protection Act 2023. I understand that my updated KYC record will replace my previous record on file.
6. Risk Re-Scoring: I understand that my application will be subject to a fresh automated risk assessment. I acknowledge that if I am assessed as high-risk, my account reactivation may require a UBA Account Officer to contact me within 24–48 hours before reactivation is approved. I accept that this is a compliance requirement and not a refusal of service.
7. Security Responsibility: I confirm that I will not share my PIN, password, or OTP with any person. I acknowledge that UBA will never request these credentials and accept full responsibility for any transactions authorised using my credentials after reactivation.
8. I agree that UBA may decline to reactivate my account if the information or documents submitted are found to be false, expired, or inconsistent with records held by regulatory authorities, without prejudice to any further action UBA may take.

📋
Address Verification In Progress
We were unable to complete your address verification digitally at this time. No action is needed from you — our Address Verification Team will reach out within 24–48 hours to complete this step.
What Happens Next
1
A UBA Address Verification Officer will contact you within 24–48 hours on your registered phone number to schedule a brief address confirmation
2
Once your address is confirmed, your application will continue automatically — your BVN, ID and liveness check are all saved. You will not need to restart
3
You will receive an SMS confirmation once your address has been verified and your application has been approved
📱
SMS Confirmation Sent
An SMS has been sent to your registered number confirming that your address verification is underway. Application ID: 78432
🔍 Internal note — not visible to customer: Multiple document substitutions detected on the same address. Journey paused. Case automatically escalated to Address Verification Team with full pre-verification record attached — BVN confirmed, ID verified, liveness passed. Field officer confirms residency only before approval is released.
🔒 UBA will never ask for your PIN, password or OTP during this verification.
📋

Getting Started

Welcome to UBA Digital KYC

This demo walks through the complete digital KYC journey inside the UBA Mobile App. Navigate through Login → Home → More → Self Service → Account Upgrade & Reactivation to begin.

🚀

Account Upgrade

Tier 1 → Tier 3. System identifies only missing documents — no restart needed

🔓

Account Reactivation

Full KYC re-verification — document upload, address check, IDD profile, liveness check, and risk scoring before the account is restored

📋

Informed Consent First

T&C screen shown before any data is collected — correct compliance order, consent before collection

🏦

Real App Navigation

Journey starts from the actual UBA app login screen — exactly how a customer would access it
